title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 16–19, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Bellemere chooses to acknowledge Nami and Nojiko as her daughters, even when it costs her life.

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Get out of my sight, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't ever want to see you step foot in this village again!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could she do such a stupid thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: did she never consider belliemere as her mother...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's not it...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami loved Belliemere!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you remember what Belliemere said to us once?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She said as long as we continue to live on,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We'll surely come across fun times as well...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: After Arlong took me to their ship,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 5 Marine ships came after them.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But they were all so easily sunk.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm certain... that the government won't ever send help to this island.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Because the ARLONG Pirates would easily destroy them!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's why we have to help ourselves...!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: You're going to buy the village from them with 100 million belli!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yup.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In return, I have to join their crew and draw maps for them...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But even an adult working his entire life away probably couldn't raise up that much money!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well I have no choice but to do it myself!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because I know everyone is doing their best just to pay the tribute.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And if I ask anyone for help again... they'll just end up injured...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I... I don't ever want that to happen again...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But... won't it be hard? You'll have to work with the one who killed belliemere...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can still smile even when looking at his face...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've decided to never cry again!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: And that I'll fight alone!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Today's Perfect Art Weather!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: USOPP GALLERY PIRATES!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He was born in

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
